title: Formatting, Style, and Editor Consistency · Signal Triage
summary: Create one fast deterministic formatting path for code and configuration. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a zero-diff formatting gate and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose a deterministic formatter and define supported file scope.
Separate local write mode from CI check-only mode.
Use editor-independent whitespace, newline, and charset settings.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair
steps.instruction: Append a gates-format-migration-3hjp7s: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Format Migration into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
gates-format-migration-3hjp7s:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The structural check is only one gate. The following changed-case decision and explanation must also hold.

steps.title: Publish the incident record
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Format Migration applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Introduce or replace formatting with isolated reviewable migration commits.
